default_strike.text:
Unique master. Path.
Put this card on a vampire you control. This vampire gets +1 stealth, -1 bleed, and can inflict 1 damage on any minion as a (D) action. During this vampire's unlock phase, his or her controller must discard a master card or lock this vampire. Burn this card if this vampire commits diablerie. A vampire can have only one path.
